files.name: Topological Order
files.content:
0 -> 1 we need to do 0 in order to do 1
1 -> 2
2 -> 3
3 -> 0

so, we need to do 0  to do 1, so, we check if we can do 0 then we need to do 3 then 2 then 1 and then 0

so, Here it's a deadlock -> so, You can't do any of there courses 1 0 3 2 0 -> 1 we need to do 0 in order to do 1
1 -> 2
2 -> 3


 1 0 2 1 3 nothing nothing

 Here, we see 1 -> 1 needs 0 and 0 needs nothing and can be done

so, we check 2 and 2 needs 1 and 1 can be done -> so, 2 can also be done

we check 3 and 3 needs 2 and 2 can be done

so, All courses can be done


what we are doing here is doing a dfs and going until a course where there is no pre-requisite and doing it and storing it's done
and finishing all pre-requisites to finish this course. You find the deadlock/cycle if any current dfs course comes twice


Algorithm 

1. we store it this way 0 : [] what pre-requisties this course need and go into that rabbit hole until we don't have any courses
2. we use state 
    0 - not visited yet
    1 - currently in dfs path
    2 - finsihed

when we visit a prerequisite course and if it is in state 0 -> we call dfs and make state as 1 as this is currently added to path
and if it is state 1 then that means this node is already there is path and a cycle is formed 
state - 2 means course completed and no need to take dfs() as it is done

After all pre-requsites are done then we this course as 2 state and put it in the order

Topological Order : It is an order where u .. v then there will be edge from u to v. All edges will be from left to right only.

                                
                                                    0         1         2         3 
 0 is done before 1 and 1 is done before 2 and 2 is done before 3 and this is an order we do courses and this is what is 
topological order where every (u,v) where edge goes from left node to some right node



 %%

Thoughts : This looks like some shortest path problem type but each component having multiple formats instead of not just 1 format

ToolA : [pdf, docx, txt] -> Layer 1
If there is any nodes connected Layer 1 then they become -> Layer 2
and so
